languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} будто с ума сошли, Лорд-капитан. Одни показания спорят с другими и все несут какую-то неразбериху. Либо это какая-то новая аномалия, либо кто-то очень не хочет, чтобы его нашли".

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} будто с ума сошли, Лорд-капитан. Одни показания спорят с другими и все несут какую-то неразбериху. Либо это какая-то новая аномалия, либо кто-то очень не хочет, чтобы его нашли".

languages.text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."
languages.original_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Авгуры{/g} будто с ума сошли, Лорд-капитан. Одни показания спорят с другими и все несут какую-то неразбериху. Либо это какая-то новая аномалия, либо кто-то очень не хочет, чтобы его нашли".

traits.locale_text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

"Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

"Our augurs seem to have gone mad, Lord Captain. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in a complete muddle. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

"Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

"Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

languages.text: 「占星術師たちは狂ったようですね、艦長。読みは矛盾し、データは混乱しています。これは新たな異常なのか、それとも誰かが発見されることを望まないのかもしれないですね」
languages.original_text: "Our augurs seem to have gone mad, Lord Captain. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in a complete muddle. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

traits.locale_text: 「占星術師たちは狂ったようですね、艦長。読みは矛盾し、データは混乱しています。これは新たな異常なのか、それとも誰かが発見されることを望まないのかもしれないですね。」

languages.text: «Nuestros {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} parecen haber enloquecido, Lord Capitán. Cada lectura contradice la anterior y los datos son inconexos. O estamos ante una nueva anomalía, o hay alguien que no quiere ser encontrado en absoluto».
languages.original_text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

traits.locale_text: «Nuestros {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} parecen haber enloquecido, Lord Capitán. Cada lectura contradice la anterior y los datos son inconexos. O estamos ante una nueva anomalía, o hay alguien que no quiere ser encontrado en absoluto».

languages.text: “舰长大人，我们的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}好像疯了。每次的读数前后矛盾，数据一团混乱。这要么是某种新型异常，要么是有人真不想被我们发现。”
languages.original_text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我们的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}好像疯了。每次的读数前后矛盾，数据一团混乱。这要么是某种新型异常，要么是有人真不想被我们发现。”

languages.text: "Unsere {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} scheinen den Verstand verloren zu haben, Lord Captain. Sämtliche Messungen widersprechen sich und ihre Daten sind völlig in Unordnung. Das ist entweder eine neue Anomalie oder jemand will auf keinen Fall gefunden werden."
languages.original_text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

traits.locale_text: "Unsere {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} scheinen den Verstand verloren zu haben, Lord Captain. Sämtliche Messungen widersprechen sich und ihre Daten sind völlig in Unordnung. Das ist entweder eine neue Anomalie oder jemand will auf keinen Fall gefunden werden."

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametlerimiz{/g} çıldırmış gibi görünüyor Lord Kaptan. Her okuma bir sonrakiyle çelişiyor, veriler birbirine girdi. Bu ya yeni bir anomali ya da birileri gerçekten bulunmak istemiyor."
languages.original_text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametlerimiz{/g} çıldırmış gibi görünüyor Lord Kaptan. Her okuma bir sonrakiyle çelişiyor, veriler birbirine girdi. Bu ya yeni bir anomali ya da birileri gerçekten bulunmak istemiyor."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} semblent avoir perdu la raison. Non seulement leurs analyses ne cessent de se contredire, mais leurs données n'ont ni queue ni tête. Soit nous avons affaire à une nouvelle anomalie, soit quelqu'un ne veut vraiment pas qu'on le trouve. »
languages.original_text: "Our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} seem to have gone mad, Lord Cap'n. Every reading contradicts the next, and their data is in disarray. Either this is some new anomaly, or someone really does not want to be found."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} semblent avoir perdu la raison. Non seulement leurs analyses ne cessent de se contredire, mais leurs données n'ont ni queue ni tête. Soit nous avons affaire à une nouvelle anomalie, soit quelqu'un ne veut vraiment pas qu'on le trouve. »
